title: Federal League Championships - Backdated Update
content: This is a post added after the old site went down! You can write standard text here, include HTML tags, or use an editor plugin later. Our runners performed incredibly well on a tough course.

title: Matt McLeese Perry Relays Results
content:
The 2019 Matt McLeese Perry Relays are in the books. Congratulations to the Edison boys team and the Oakwood girls team on their team titles. Perry boys finished 3rd and the girls finished 4th in the competitive field.

Click here for full results
